deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei Wien
deals.description: Geheimtipp für eure Sommer-Bucket-List 🤞⭐️ Falls ihr dachtet, Wissenschaft sei trocken, dann wart ihr noch nicht hier! Bei @vista.science werden aktuelle Forschungsthemen kreativ und verständlich aufbereitet. deals.description: POV: You’re in Vienna during the only weekend when ALBERTINA is completely FREE. 🤍 To celebrate its 250th anniversary, ALBERTINA is offering free admission to all three locations: 📍 ALBERTINA 📍 ALBERTINA MODERN 📍 ALBERTINA KLOSTERNEUBURG 🗓️ July 4–5 ⏰ 10 AM – 6 PM Founded in 1776, ALBERTINA has grown into one of the world’s leading art museums, with over 1 million artworks, including masterpieces by Klimt, Picasso, Monet, Schiele and Dürer.
